purpose: Project a human-readable dashboard from stress lab scenario receipts without hand-authored status claims.
projectionRules: Scenario rows must be sourced from summary.scenarioResults.
Blocked outcomes must display as successful lab assertions when expectedOutcome.outcomeClass is honest_blocked.
Fallback outcomes must expose fallback posture and may not imply silent provider substitution.
Dashboard status must be derived from suite status, not edited by hand.
Guardrails must state that catalog projection is not live cognitive compile evidence.
forbiddenClaims: live provider invocation happened during catalog projection
SOG promotion completed when only expected posture was declared
blocked scenarios are failed lab cases when the expected outcome is honest_blocked
completionPosture: The dashboard is a projection from suite receipts and summary JSON.
